personal_info.name: Arjun S K
personal_info.title: Web Developer & UI/UX Engineer
personal_info.tagline: Innovative developer bridging the gap between design and technology

professional_summary: Innovative and high-performance Web Developer with over 4 years of experience building dynamic web applications. Expert in modern JavaScript frameworks including React.js, Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and SvelteKit. Specialist in the Vue.js ecosystem (Nuxt.js, Pinia, Vuex) and React. Proven track record in architecting scalable admin panels, engineering resilient API infrastructures, and optimizing frontend performance. Adept at bridging the gap between design and technology to deliver premium UI/UX experiences using Tailwind, Ant Design, and Three.js.

experience.description: Integrated Workplace Management System (IWMS) & ERP Development. Nexspace Facility Management System.
achievements: Leading the development of a next-gen facility platform using Nuxt.js and Tailwind CSS.
Architected a scalable SPA using React, Vite, and Redux Toolkit for the company admin panel.
Integrated Ant Design for complex enterprise data tables and Shadcn/Vue for accessible, high-performance interactive components.
Engineered a custom Axios layer with queue-based JWT token rotation, ensuring 99.9% session continuity.
Developed an in-browser QR scanner using jsQR and Canvas API, optimized for real-time mobile check-ins.
Established shell-scripted CI/CD workflows for automated builds and deployment to AWS EC2.
Build comprehensive facility management platform featuring real-time visitor tracking, digital pass generation, and QR code authentication.
Implement complex hierarchical data structures managing 500+ facilities across multiple cities and zones.
Developed the core admin interface using Nuxt.js and SCSS, prioritizing component modularity and long-term maintainability.
Created reusable UI modules for complex truck-booking workflows, streamlining logistics data management.
Apex (3D Ad Platform): Architected an immersive 3D ad page using Vue.js, Tailwind, and Three.js with a real-time preview module.
Performance Optimization: Slashed webpage load times by 3 seconds through aggressive code splitting and asset optimization.
NeoVision OTT: Engineered a custom video player with AI-driven scene detection and frame-by-frame rendering.
Developed 15+ dynamic web applications using React.js, Vue.js, Next.js serving 10,000+ active users.
Engineered responsive user interfaces increasing mobile user engagement by 45%.
Crafted high-performance admin panels (MyGenie) using Next.js.
Engineered facial detection features for Jio Events platform.

projects.description: Feature-rich event management system with facial recognition and dynamic media rendering.
